description: Modify existing DatoCMS plugins built with datocms-plugin-sdk and connect(). Use when users ask to patch or maintain an existing plugin project: config screen edits, hook additions, field extension tweaks, sidebar/page/outlet changes, validation updates, settings cleanup, dependency fixes, or other day-to-day plugin maintenance. Prefer `datocms-plugin-scaffold` when starting a new plugin from scratch.

results.query: Patch this existing DatoCMS plugin so its config screen renames the API key field to Service token and removes the debug toggle.
In this DatoCMS plugin project, add one more itemFormDropdownActions entry that clears the current slug field.
Update our existing DatoCMS plugin sidebar panel to show reading time only when the body field has content.
Remove the Slack workspace option from this DatoCMS plugin settings page and keep the rest of the form intact.
Wire a new renderModal hook into this existing DatoCMS plugin without reorganizing the project.
Adjust validation in this DatoCMS field extension so empty hex values are rejected before save.
How do I scaffold a new DatoCMS plugin project from scratch with Vite, React, and a connect() entrypoint?
Create a brand-new DatoCMS plugin folder that starts with a sidebar panel and config screen.
I need a DatoCMS CMA script to bulk publish all records in a model.
Set up DatoCMS draft mode and web previews in this Next.js app.
